27.sourceTitle: Schwalbe Clik Valve kaufen - Top Auswahl | BIKE24
27.evidenceText: Four distinct product pages identified: (1) p1859949.html - 60mm tubeless valve set, (2) p1859948.html - 40mm tubeless valve set, (3) p1960181.html - 28" tube with Clik Valve, (4) p1962295.html - 16" tube with Clik Valve
27.extractionRationale: Counted unique product page URLs from the provided sources. Source 1 is a category page, not a product page. Sources 2-5 each represent distinct product listings with unique p-numbers and different product specifications (different valve sizes or tube sizes). All are Clik Valve products, not accessories like pump heads.

30.evidenceText: Three product listings examined: BTI-166 (copper), BTI-165 (red), and BTI-165 (gold). None contain explicit stock status information (out of stock, unavailable, nicht verfügbar, ausverkauft).
30.extractionRationale: Stock status cannot be determined from the provided text content. The sources only include product descriptions and features without any availability or stock indicators. Therefore, returning null as per instructions.

56.extractionRationale: Counted all distinct Schwalbe inner tube models with Clik Valve designation across all sources. Excluded conversion kits (Umrüstkit) and valve/accessory products. Identified 6 unique tube models: No. 17, No. 19, No. 17-EL, No. 19L, Nr. 12, and Nr. 7, each representing distinct SKUs with different tire size ranges.

61.evidenceText: Sources provided show Aluminium Alloy prices (3215-3225), Trading Economics forecast (3674.64), and Aluminium Premium prices (2501-2520), but none directly state the current LME aluminum spot price in USD/ton.
61.extractionRationale: The evidence does not contain the current LME aluminum spot price. Source 1 is for Aluminium Alloy (not standard aluminum), Source 2 is a forecast, and Source 3 is a premium surcharge. None directly provide the requested current spot price.
